name: Roasted Red Bliss Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 head garlic, broken into cloves and peeled
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Scrub the potatoes well and cut them in half.
3. In a bowl, combine the potatoes with the olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper, tossing to coat.
4. Arrange the potatoes in a roasting pan in a single layer and sprinkle with 1/4 cup water.
5. Roast the potatoes for 45 minutes or until the potatoes and garlic are tender and golden brown.
6. In a serving bowl, toss the potatoes and garlic with the Parmesan and parsley.
Yield: 4 servings
